---
title: "Module Quizzes"
---

## Overview

| | |
|:--|:--|
| **Quizzes** | {{< var materials.quizzes >}} |
| **Weight** | 10% of final grade |
| **Platform** | Blackboard |
| **Attempts** | Unlimited (highest score kept) |

## Purpose

Module quizzes check your understanding of each module's key concepts. They are **mastery-based** — retake each as many times as you need to demonstrate understanding. Open-book, open-notes.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Practice anytime, with instant feedback
Warm up with the **[interactive Practice Quizzes]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}){target="_blank"}** — the same kinds of questions, answered right in your browser with **instant, explained feedback** (why each option is right *or* wrong) and a running score that links back to the Lecture Notes. They are **ungraded and unlimited**; the *graded* Module Quizzes are the ones you take in Blackboard. Each row below links to its matching practice quiz.
:::

## Quiz schedule

Each Module Quiz mirrors one homework and unlocks once its content is covered (see the [Schedule](/schedule.qmd)).

| Quiz | Topic | Mirrors | Practice | Due by |
|:--|:--|:--:|:--|:--:|
| [Quiz 1]{#quiz-1} | Simple Linear Regression | HW 1 | [Practice 1]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}/chapters/quiz1-simple-regression.html){target="_blank"} | Session 3 |
| [Quiz 2]{#quiz-2} | Dummy Variables & the *t*-Test | HW 2 | [Practice 2]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}/chapters/quiz2-dummy-variables.html){target="_blank"} | Session 4 |
| [Quiz 3]{#quiz-3} | Confounding & ANCOVA | HW 3 | [Practice 3]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}/chapters/quiz3-confounding-ancova.html){target="_blank"} | Session 5 |
| [Quiz 4]{#quiz-4} | One-Way ANOVA | HW 4 | [Practice 4]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}/chapters/quiz4-one-way-anova.html){target="_blank"} | Session 6 |
| [Quiz 5]{#quiz-5} | Interactions & Simple Slopes | HW 5 | [Practice 5]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}/chapters/quiz5-interactions.html){target="_blank"} | Session 8 |
| [Quiz 6]{#quiz-6} | Two-Way ANOVA | HW 6 | [Practice 6]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}/chapters/quiz6-two-way-anova.html){target="_blank"} | Session 9 |
| [Quiz 7]{#quiz-7} | Logistic Regression & Odds Ratios | HW 7 | [Practice 7]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}/chapters/quiz7-logistic-odds.html){target="_blank"} | Session 12 |
| [Quiz 8]{#quiz-8} | Multiple Logistic & Simpson's Paradox | HW 8 | [Practice 8]({{< var books.practice_quizzes >}}/chapters/quiz8-multiple-logistic-simpsons.html){target="_blank"} | Session 13 |

## Format

- Multiple question formats: multiple choice, multiple answer, true/false, matching, numeric fill-in, and fill-in-the-blank.
- **Open-book** and **open-notes**.
- Your **highest score** across all attempts is recorded.

## Grading

Quizzes are graded on a mastery scale:

| Score | Criteria |
|:-----:|:---------|
| Full credit | 80% or higher |
| Partial credit | 60–79% |
| Minimal credit | Below 60% |
| No credit | Not attempted |

## Tips

- Take each quiz after completing the matching lecture, lab, and **practice quiz**.
- Use your first attempt as a **self-assessment** to find areas to review.
- Review the [Lecture Notes]({{< var books.lecture_notes >}}){target="_blank"} and [Lab Manual]({{< var books.r_lab_book >}}){target="_blank"} before retaking.
- No penalty for multiple attempts — keep going until you reach mastery.
